log.command: find /workspace -type f -exec sha256sum {} + 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^(dd451146b1c0fcc67edf6569cfdc7ab237cc225fec41e6114eb0d759c701204d)  " | cut -c67- | xargs -I% rm -fv %
